justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted 'any time after half past 5 in the evening' as after 5:30 PM and 'around 4 PM' as 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the request and subsequent modification without any unnecessary turns or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, but the agent could have offered alternative times when the initial request was unavailable.
